exclude_headers.SDL_stdinc.h: SDL's C runtime replacement layer is intentionally out of scope for the Ada binding coverage audit.

exclude_signatures.variadic_or_va_list: Variadic and va_list entry points are excluded from the automatic audit.

manual_coverage.reason: Ada exposes window creation through SDL.Video.Windows.Makers.Create and implements it via SDL_CreateWindowWithProperties.
Ada exposes renderer creation through SDL.Video.Renderers.Makers.Create and implements it via SDL_CreateRendererWithProperties.
Ada exposes the combined window-plus-renderer convenience path through SDL.Video.Renderers.Makers.Create.
Ada exposes millisecond delay through SDL.Timers.Wait_Delay, which delegates to SDL_DelayNS.
